Ready stock available in Singapore 1.75mm 1kg PLA filament

1.75mm 1kg PLA filament

Suitable for most 3D printers.

Please note that Luminous PLA is abrasive, we recommended to use stainless steel or hardened steel nozzles to print these filament.

Extruder temperature: 200°C - 220°C

Heated bed temperature: 0°C to 60°C

Density: 1.24 g/cm3

  1. PLA is biodegradable, non-harmful, non-toxic and environmentally friendly.
  2. Good material toughness and good material strength.
  3. Low material shrinkage rate and uniform diameter.
  4. Suitable for complex models.

Filament net weight: 1kg

Spool weight: 200g

Box Weight: 100g

Spool: 200mm (Outer Diameter) * 55mm (Inner Diameter) * 65mm (Height)

All filament will be packed in vacuum sealed plastic bag with silica gel.

Tips:

  • To avoid moisture, keep the filament with zip-lock bag when it's not in use.
  • Attach the filament end to the side of the spool with small binder clip.

标题: [SG] Anycubic 3D Printing Standard Resin 1KG 405nm UV MSLA LCD
详情: [{"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/8b054cedbe08ee741d84745333ec3eaa.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "ANYCUBIC 3D Printer Resin 1kg 405nm SLA UV-Curing Resin High Precision and Quick Curing Excellent Fluidity for LCD 3D Printing Parameter Information: Hardness: 79 D Viscosity(25°C): 552 mpa.s Curing wavelength: 405 nm Liquid density: 1.1g/cm³ Solid density: 1.184 g/cm³ Shrinkage: 0.071 Tensile strength: 23.4 Mpa Curing time: 6-10 s Elongation at break: 0.142 Main material: resin monomer & photo initiator Exposure parameters: Bottom exposure time(s) 20-60s, normal exposure time(s) 5-15s Precautions:Storage Method:Keep away from light seals at room temperature. (Sunshine contains a lot of UV light, will solidify photosensitive resin. After testing, the light is not affected as long as it is not UV light).It is recommended to save at 15 ℃ -35 ℃ ambient temperature, the lower the temperature, the higher the viscosity of the resin. Sealed storage, excessive dust or moisture can affect print quality. Sunshine contains a lot of UV light, will solidify photosensitive resin.Usage:Shake well before use, prohibiting the use of resin in places where there is a lot of sunlight.Wear gloves before use to avoid direct contact with the skin and keep the room ventilated.Inadvertent contact, as soon as possible to use a lot of water rinse. If you feel unwell, seek timely medical attention. Printed models need to use high-concentration alcohol to clean about 30S (recommended concentration of 95% or more, the higher the better).Do not pour the resin in the resin vat into the unused resin, do not leave the resin in the resin vat for a long time without use to avoid resin pollution affect the printing effect(long time without the resin can be introduced into airtight containers or sealed with plastic wrap shading save)."}]

ANYCUBIC 3D Printer Resin 1kg405nm SLA UV-Curing Resin

High Precision and Quick Curing

Excellent Fluidity for LCD 3D Printing

Parameter Information:

Hardness: 79 D

Viscosity(25°C): 552 mpa.s

Curing wavelength: 405 nm

Liquid density: 1.1g/cm³

Solid density: 1.184 g/cm³

Shrinkage: 0.071

Tensile strength: 23.4 Mpa

Curing time: 6-10 s

Elongation at break: 0.142

Main material: resin monomer & photo initiator

Exposure parameters:

Bottom exposure time(s) 20-60s,

normal exposure time(s) 5-15s

Precautions:Storage Method:Keep away from light seals at room temperature. (Sunshine contains a lot of UV light, will solidify photosensitive resin. After testing, the light is not affected as long as it is not UV light).It is recommended to save at 15 ℃ -35 ℃ ambient temperature, the lower the temperature, the higher the viscosity of the resin.

Sealed storage, excessive dust or moisture can affect print quality. Sunshine contains a lot of UV light, will solidify photosensitive resin.Usage:Shake well before use, prohibiting the use of resin in places where there is a lot of sunlight.Wear gloves before use to avoid direct contact with the skin and keep the room ventilated.Inadvertent contact, as soon as possible to use a lot of water rinse. If you feel unwell, seek timely medical attention.

Printed models need to use high-concentration alcohol to clean about 30S (recommended concentration of 95% or more, the higher the better).Do not pour the resin in the resin vat into the unused resin, do not leave the resin in the resin vat for a long time without use to avoid resin pollution affect the printing effect(long time without the resin can be introduced into airtight containers or sealed with plastic wrap shading save).
